mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_safety_health_info_register WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_health_info_register ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, hr_id, hr_nm, orgn_id, orgn_nm, jbrp_id, jbrp_nm, use_yn, key_content, action_content, receipt_dt, action_dt, reply_dt, remark, action_orgn_id, action_orgn_nm, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{orgnId}, #{orgnNm}, #{jbrpId}, #{jbrpNm}, #{useYn}, #{keyContent}, #{actionContent}, #{receiptDt}, #{actionDt}, #{replyDt}, #{remark}, #{actionOrgnId}, #{actionOrgnNm}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_safety_health_info_register SET hr_id = #{hrId}, hr_nm = #{hrNm}, orgn_id = #{orgnId}, orgn_nm = #{orgnNm}, jbrp_id = #{jbrpId}, jbrp_nm = #{jbrpNm}, use_yn = #{useYn}, key_content = #{keyContent}, action_content = #{actionContent}, receipt_dt = #{receiptDt}, action_dt = #{actionDt}, reply_dt = #{replyDt}, remark = #{remark}, action_orgn_id = #{actionOrgnId}, action_orgn_nm = #{actionOrgnNm}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND comp_id = #{compId}
